title: Napaea discolor
taxonomy: Napaea discolor is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Mexico and Central America, and is known to grow in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is classified as a member of the genus Napaea, which is part of the family Rubiaceae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants. This classification suggests a close relationship with other plants in the Rubiaceae family, which includes species such as gardenias and coffee plants. Further research into the specific classification of Napaea discolor may provide more detailed information about its taxonomic position.
